title: blechnum lherminieri
intro: Blechnum lherminieri, also known as the Lherminier's chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a terrestrial fern that is native to tropical Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum lherminieri include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Blechnum lherminieri include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas and salves for topical application.
